active_concerns: Throttle must not double-count cache hits / skipped items into the window (AC-V3-001-004)
response.usage may be None on some providers/mocks — treat as 0 tokens, never crash (AC-V3-001-003)
429 retry path MODIFIES AC-4-010: 429 retries before skipping; all other errors skip immediately
API key + prompt must never leak into throttle/retry log lines (AC-4-012)
Existing AC-4-010 test breaks without update (task 5.2) — now retries before skip

terminology.sliding window: in-memory 60s record of per-call total_tokens used to decide when to sleep
terminology.tokens_per_minute: configurable per-minute token budget (default 6000, Groq free tier)
terminology.retry-then-skip: 429 triggers exp-backoff retry (max 3, honoring Retry-After) before the existing skip-log-continue fallback
